purpose: Freeze a label-free post-detector evidence analyzer for the 72-row multi-case rival-contradiction/region-contamination detector substrate before any evaluation-only join, terminal utility, candidate rejection, first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, Step 4-5 promotion, or paper claim.

paper_framing.natural_proof_rule: The detector/SAM2 substrate has passed at multi-case scale. The natural next step is not a terminal score, but a frozen label-free evidence-state layer that records which candidate/role observations support contradiction, overlap, contamination, or missing evidence.

candidate_role_semantics.candidate_a: first action-frozen candidate in the source pair, not a correctness label
candidate_role_semantics.candidate_b: second action-frozen candidate in the source pair, not a correctness label

reserved_future_schema_fields.goal_validity_risk: reserved for later evidence/evaluation join or policy utility, not action input in this analyzer
reserved_future_schema_fields.viewpoint_evidence_gap: reserved for later active utility calculation, not terminal evidence here
reserved_future_schema_fields.map_pose_consistency_uncertainty: reserved for later Semantic-SLAM utility, not derived in this analyzer
reserved_future_schema_fields.wrong_goal_visit: evaluation-only after evidence rows are frozen
reserved_future_schema_fields.wasted_path_m: evaluation-only after evidence rows are frozen
reserved_future_schema_fields.map_pose_consistency_delta: evaluation-only after evidence rows are frozen

forbidden_action_inputs: evaluation-only pair label before evidence rows are written
evaluation-only baseline outcome before evidence rows are written
expected_command_shape: docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace:ro -v /home/yoohyun/research3/local_dataset/runs:/runs -w /workspace research3/openvocab-perception:20260513-v3c-gdino-sam2 python -B -m py_compile src/h001_runtime/materialize_rival_contradiction_region_contamination_multi_case_detector_evidence.py

docker run --rm --user $(id -u):$(id -g) -e HOME=/tmp -e PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 -e PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache -e PYTHONPATH=/workspace/src -v /home/yoohyun/research3:/workspace:ro -v /home/yoohyun/research3/local_dataset/runs:/runs -w /workspace research3/openvocab-perception:20260513-v3c-gdino-sam2 python -B -m h001_runtime.materialize_rival_contradiction_region_contamination_multi_case_detector_evidence --out-root /runs/h001_rival_contradiction_region_contamination_multi_case_detector_evidence_v1
next_allowed_step_after_contract: Implement the Docker label-free multi-case detector evidence materializer and write candidate-view, role, pair, request, audit, and summary outputs.

interpretation_rule.fact: The multi-case detector/SAM2 substrate passed the frozen gate with enough role, scene, query, and candidate-tuple coverage to define evidence rows.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The method should preserve detector evidence as nonterminal evidence states because ObjectNav goal-validity, wrong-goal, wasted-path, and map/pose behavior are not available until an evaluation-only join after the evidence rows are frozen.
interpretation_rule.paper_claim: This contract permits only a nonterminal evidence-state materializer. ObjectNav improvement, Semantic-SLAM utility, wrong-goal reduction, wasted-path reduction, map/pose consistency improvement, first_eval rerun, and paper claims remain blocked.
